name: Fall Ball Idle
description: dle Fall Balls is an addictive idle simulation game where balls of all kinds — football, tennis, golf, pool, volleyball, rugby and more — fall through colorful obstacles in satisfying physics-based action. Tap or click near the balls to nudge them and guide their fall through barriers while earning coins and upgrades. Upgrade balls, improve traits, and watch your idle income grow even when you’re away. With simple touch controls, casual gameplay, and hyper-casual fun, this HTML5 browser game delivers endless challenge and replayability for players of all ages.
instructions: Mouse Left click and drag the mouse or tap to play
